meaning: asset lacks an owner agent
required_action: assign owner or stop

meaning: repo lacks owner or universe assignment
required_action: assign owner universe tower and validator

meaning: agent lacks authority level or escalation path
required_action: assign level and escalation target

meaning: tool lacks allowed or blocked surface
required_action: declare allowed and blocked surfaces

meaning: requested action is write/cost/live/tenant/production without order
required_action: prepare governed order with rollback postcheck evidence

meaning: secret access or global state write risk detected
required_action: stop, redact, require explicit order and backup

meaning: repo has unclassified local changes
required_action: classify changed files before write/versioning

meaning: API live or remote persistent agent requested
required_action: require API gate and no-sensitive precheck

meaning: an agent lacks folder index row or required workpaper file
required_action: create or restore workpaper artifacts before closeout

meaning: plugin is referenced without availability live boundary or validator
required_action: declare plugin boundary or mark NO_DISPONIBLE

meaning: live Microsoft read/write requested without full governed order
required_action: prepare order with surface identity owner rollback postcheck evidence

meaning: parallel lane lacks owner validator evidence or stop condition
required_action: assign owner validator evidence and stop condition before dispatch

meaning: two or more lanes can write the same scope
required_action: split scopes or serialize work under one owner

meaning: prepared order lacks required fields
required_action: complete surface owner identity rollback postcheck evidence validator and stop condition

meaning: OpenAI API live cost vector store or remote agent requested without full order
required_action: prepare OpenAI order packet and stop before execution

meaning: retrospective lacks merged PR validator or failure evidence
required_action: attach PR merge commit validator status and next-hardening items

meaning: GitHub order lacks branch PR checks rollback postcheck or merge boundary
required_action: complete GitHub order packet or stop

meaning: production action requested without separate explicit authorization
required_action: prepare production order and stop before execution

meaning: skill or subskill is referenced without catalog assignment or agent owner
required_action: assign skill owner and validator before use

meaning: recipe or subrecipe is referenced without index row owner or validator
required_action: add recipe index row or stop

meaning: copied source material is being treated as rector canon without local adoption decision
required_action: record source boundary and adoption decision

meaning: merge force push workflow write permission or protected action requested without order
required_action: prepare GitHub order packet and stop before action

meaning: automated merge requested but PR base branch head checks mergeability validator or boundary precheck failed
required_action: stop before merge and record failing precheck

meaning: merge requested without operator approval fixed HEAD green checks and postcheck evidence
required_action: obtain approved lifecycle or stop before merge

meaning: source capability lacks adoption decision boundary or gate
required_action: record adoption decision gate owner and validator

meaning: agent skill recipe tool validator evidence or stop condition is missing from an operational action
required_action: declare complete operational chain or stop before closeout

meaning: instruction source precedence is absent unclear or weaker than AGENTS.md
required_action: restore AGENTS.md as root source and stop contradictory action

meaning: nested instruction surface lacks owner reviewer validator evidence or stop condition
required_action: map the surface or stop before using it

meaning: root wrapper instruction could absorb move or rewrite a nested repo boundary
required_action: preserve nested repo and prepare separate governed order

meaning: repo-local skill metadata lacks description trigger boundary allowed or blocked actions validator or catalog coverage
required_action: fix SKILL.md metadata or register a tracked quality row before use

meaning: document or dataset boundary is broad regulated or not selected enough to process safely
required_action: prepare governed order with exact selected files data limit retention evidence and postcheck

meaning: secret-like content is detected or likely in a selected artifact
required_action: stop redact avoid persistence and require separate governed order

meaning: document work lacks document type skill owner reviewer storage validator or stop condition
required_action: map the document lane or stop before processing

meaning: technical source freshness authority license or scope is uncertain
required_action: refresh source classify freshness risk and keep it outside authority canon

meaning: agent skill recipe plugin tool surface validator evidence or stop condition is missing before intake derivation or execution
required_action: declare the full capability-use chain or stop before execution

meaning: local runtime alignment did not pass or could not prove agent repo skill recipe tool consistency
required_action: rerun runtime alignment or stop before declaring aligned

meaning: agent default skill recipe tool or plugin assignment is missing or unresolved
required_action: restore default assignment or mark NO_DISPONIBLE with evidence before use

meaning: Codex Cloud task execution was requested for a repo without a visible or registered governed environment
required_action: register or select the exact environment and keep the lane blocked until evidence exists

meaning: an autonomous task agent was requested without owner surface branch rollback evidence validator or stop condition
required_action: prepare governed task-scoped order and stop before autonomous execution

meaning: remote or persistent agent execution was requested without explicit governed order
required_action: stop before persistence and prepare order with expiry rollback and postcheck

meaning: repo local path branch remote or GitHub readback is missing or mismatched
required_action: refresh repo alignment evidence or stop repo-scoped work

meaning: Codex app local or worktree environment config is missing invalid or not repo-visible
required_action: create or repair the .codex environment and validate before dispatching worktrees

meaning: Codex Cloud environment creation was requested but no real creation tool or API is available in the session
required_action: mark NO_DISPONIBLE and prepare UI or admin order with rollback and postcheck

meaning: required tests were not all planned executed or proven equivalent
required_action: expand execution or fix manifest graph executor evidence before merge or release

meaning: a runner change would reduce required coverage or hide a mandatory failure
required_action: restore full required coverage and expose mandatory failures before approval

meaning: a Dataverse or runtime action targets the wrong environment or Default
required_action: stop and require exact DEV target identity plus rollback and postcheck

meaning: a retrospective learning package lacks required source evidence or local validator coverage
required_action: stop and add the missing source evidence before PR review

meaning: a runtime or back-reference write target has zero or multiple exact candidates
required_action: block target write and record no-inference evidence

meaning: a controlled runtime test would process more than one item or leave any manifest flow active
required_action: restore safe state and stop before further processing

meaning: a mapping record or target write would proceed without deterministic keys or would rely on a guessed target
required_action: block write and require exact keys or target identity

meaning: VSI startup detected a completed local task downgraded from EXECUTED state
required_action: restore the canonical task queue state before continuing startup

meaning: VSI startup detected a reused loopback bridge serving a different repo root
required_action: stop startup before changing user settings and restart the bridge for the expected repo

meaning: secret-like content is detected or would be printed or persisted
required_action: stop redact and require external secret store or sanitized evidence

meaning: a local mock smoke did not pass
required_action: fix local mock or keep the related execution lane stopped

meaning: tenant site team channel or object target is ambiguous
required_action: stop live surface and require exact tenant or object target

meaning: execution is otherwise allowed but lacks exact target
required_action: record exact missing target and next command without mutating live surface

meaning: execution is otherwise allowed but lacks confirmed identity
required_action: record required identity and stop only that substep

meaning: execution is otherwise allowed but lacks owner or reviewer
required_action: record required owner and stop only that substep

meaning: Codex Cloud smoke was requested but environment label or environment is unavailable
required_action: mark pending target or environment and keep local validation evidence

meaning: Codex Cloud apply would run without reviewed diff and approval
required_action: stop apply and use status or diff only

meaning: MCP remote write was attempted without exact governed target and rollback
required_action: stop write and run read-only or mock probe only

meaning: Teams install or message lacks exact team chat channel app or owner
required_action: stop Teams live write and keep DEV validation only

meaning: production action lacks explicit production gate
required_action: stop production and keep DEV read-only evidence only

meaning: a multi-agent wave stage lacks input output evidence validator risk rollback or handoff contract
required_action: complete the agent contract before executing the wave
